stem:
Select the number (from among the given options) that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.
13, 122, 234, 318, ?, 446

Select the option that is related to the fifth number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number and the fourth number is related to the third number.
17 : 197 :: 11 : 143 :: 7 : ?
(NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g. 13 – Operations on 13 such as adding/subtracting/multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.)

A large tanker can be filled by pipes A and B in 60 minutes and 30 minutes, respectively. How much time will it take to fill the tanker, if the tanker is first filled by pipe B and then the remaining tank by pipes A and B opened together?
The centre of curvature of a convex mirror is located at +18 cm, as per New Cartesian Sign convention. Its focus is at:

Six classmates L, M, N, O, P and Q compare their IGCSE results of their final exam. Each of them scored different marks. O scored more than N but less than L. M scored more than N. P scored less than N but more than Q. L scored more than M. Who among the six scored the least?

Pinky walked 360 m towards north, then she turned right and walked 240 m. Then she turned right and walked 360 m, then she turned left and walked 120 m. Finally, she turned left and walked 120 m. In which direction and how many metres is she from the starting position?
(All turns are 90 degree turns only)

Select the term from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following alpha-numeric series to make it logically complete.
2Z6, 8V12, 15U18, 24W24, 35V36, ?

There are 18 mobile phones, each of separate brands, arranged in a straight row in a mobile centre. The K-brand mobile is 4th from the left side of the row and the M-brand mobile is 14th from the right side of the row. How many mobile phones are between the K and M brands?
A quadratic equation whose roots are −2/3 and −3/2 is:
Name the process by which soluble products of photosynthesis are transported to other parts of the plant.
Which of the following reactions is NOT an example of a displacement reaction?
If each of the digits in the number 417593286 is arranged in ascending order from left to right, the position of how many digits will remain unchanged as compared to that in the original number?

Pipe P can fill 2/5 part of a tank in 18 hours and pipe Q can fill 3/5 part of the same tank in 12 hours. Both P and Q were kept open for 4 hours, then both were closed. Pipe R alone was then opened and it emptied the water in the tank in 5(1/2) hours. In how many hours can pipes P and Q together fill the empty tank?
Catenation property is shown by:
______, the then largest NBFC – MFI got merged with IndusInd bank in July 2019.

Select the option that is related to the fifth number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number and the fourth number is related to the third number.
15 : 28 :: 18 : 34 :: 20 : ?
How many resistors of 12 Ω must be connected in parallel combination to obtain 4 Ω resistance?
Bone is an example of which of the following types of tissues?
For the equation 2x² + bx + 3 = 0, the smaller root is 0.5. Find the value of b.

Select the option that is related to the fifth letter-cluster in the same way as the second letter-cluster is related to the first letter-cluster and the fourth letter-cluster is related to the third letter-cluster.
PROTEIN : ORPTNIE :: CONTAIN : NOCNIAT :: ROUTINE : ?
In the reaction MnO₂ + 4HCl → MnCl₂ + 2H₂O + Cl₂:
options: Mn does not undergo redox reaction

stem: In India, Petrol price was liberalized and deregulated in June:
By selling an article for ₹18.70, a man makes a profit of 10%. By how much should the sales price be increased to make a profit of 40%?
If ₹12,500 amounts to ₹15,488 in 2 years at 8% compound interest per annum, compounded annually, then the value of n is:
Which of following molecules govern the inheritance of a trait by the offspring?
